flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southern Oregon University fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (28.3% → 20.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Oregon University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.1k → $12.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern Oregon University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Oregon University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.0k → $31.9k).
